choices.text: Path = geometric sequence of positions. Trajectory = path + time: position(t), velocity(t), acceleration(t). Trajectory respects velocity/acceleration limits + smooth continuity for hardware compatibility.

Trapezoidal velocity profile (accel + cruise + decel) respecting max velocity + acceleration. S-curve for jerk-limited (smoother on motors). Quintic polynomial for smooth high-derivative continuity. MoveIt handles automatically.

questions.explanation: Trapezoidal / S-curve / quintic for smooth motion.
